_schema.purpose: wq-074 — editorial structure for capital.html 3-column sankey. Column 0 bucket totals come from market_aggregates._cumulative_2023_2025 (engine-derived). This file editorially sub-allocates within mag7 + sovereign to preserve narrative granularity (MSFT/AWS/Google/Meta/Oracle/AI labs direct as distinct nodes within mag7; China + Sovereign/Gov within sovereign). Columns 1 + 2 are pure editorial ratios — Column 1 = capex destinations (silicon/networking/etc.); Column 2 = current utilization state.
_schema.principle: Engine drives bucket totals; editorial drives within-bucket structure. Sub-shares scale proportionally with bucket totals unless individually overridden.

column0_sub_allocation._comment: Engine produces 4 bucket totals from market_aggregates; this file editorially sub-allocates within mag7 and sovereign for narrative granularity. Sub-shares scale proportionally as bucket totals change unless individually overridden in consensus_overrides. Sub-shares within each bucket sum to 1.0.

_provenance.src: Editorial sub-allocation derived from capital.html hardcoded FLOWS at time of wq-074 rewire (2026-05-03). mag7: MSFT 28% + AWS 21% + Google 22% + Meta 16% + Oracle 9% + AI labs direct 4%. sovereign: China 62% + Sovereign/Gov 38%. Tunable; overrideable per company via consensus_overrides if specific data lands.

column1_destination_ratios._comment: What % of total capex went to each hardware/infra category. Sums to 1.0. Empirical ratios from capital.html FLOWS at time of wq-074 rewire (745B baseline pre-engine-rewire). NVIDIA GPUs 40.7% reflects mag7 + neocloud GPU-heavy spend; Data Centre Costs 29.4% covers DC build-out + cooling.

_provenance.src: Industry-standard hardware procurement allocation. Verified against capital.html FLOWS (303 + 72 + 57 + 219 + 94 = 745). Cross-check: NVIDIA DC revenue ~$130B 2024 supports the GPU-heavy share. Tunable as procurement mix shifts (e.g. ASIC growth in 2026 may compress NVIDIA share).

column2_utilization_splits._comment: Current utilization of deployed capex. Sums to 1.0. Empirical ratios from capital.html FLOWS at time of wq-074 rewire. Heavy 'in_build_or_transit' (41.6%) reflects ongoing buildout across cumulative 2023-25 horizon — not all capex has deployed and become productive yet. 'inference_ad_platform' (27%) is the Meta/Google self-use story; paid customer inference is only ~6.7%.

_provenance.src: Editorial estimate of GPU/infra utilization. Empirical ratios from capital.html FLOWS at wq-074 rewire baseline. The high in_build_or_transit share (~42%) reflects cumulative 2023-25 horizon — capex deployed in 2024-25 hasn't all reached productive use yet. Sliders in capital.html let users adjust at render time without changing this baseline.

source_display_names._comment: Maps slug-style sub-allocation keys to capital.html label conventions (matches NODE_COLOR / NODE_TIER maps in the existing render).
